headline: The Problem They Had
body_text: A home services company was getting 200+ inquiries per week. Three people spent their entire day answering phones, responding to emails, and quoting simple jobs. Response time averaged 4-6 hours. They were losing deals to faster competitors.

headline: What They Actually Built
body_text: An AI system that instantly answers common questions, pulls service history, generates accurate quotes for standard jobs, and schedules appointments. All integrated with their existing CRM. Human staff only handles complex cases and closes deals.

headline: The Real Results
body_text: Average response time dropped from 4 hours to 32 minutes. Two staff members moved to higher-value sales roles. Conversion rate increased 23% because leads got answers while they were still engaged. No customers lost to response delays.

headline: Why This Actually Worked
body_text: They didn't try to automate everything at once. Started with the 20 questions that represented 80% of inquiries. Built the system around real customer conversations, not theoretical scenarios. Tested for two weeks before going live.
